typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require handoff commit IDs to reference implementation commits for the reviewed feature, not later synthesis-only commits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review report for m3-fix-incremental-chunk-persistence-production-paths observed handoff commitId 5cac711 points to validation synthesis changes, while implementation changes are in 7fe57e4 and da94268.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce explicit startup evidence for required library reads (.factory/library/architecture.md and .factory/library/user-testing.md) before allowing followedProcedure=true.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review report for m3-fix-incremental-chunk-persistence-production-paths found no transcript evidence for those required reads.
